items.title: US Supreme Court limits use of race in drawing electoral maps
items.dek: The decision will make it more difficult to successfully challenge legislative maps for diluting the voting power of racial minorities.
items.body: The decision will make it more difficult to successfully challenge legislative maps for diluting the voting power of racial minorities.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Robert Mugabe's son to be deported from South Africa over firearms offence
items.dek: The 28-year-old was arrested in February after a man had been shot at his home in Johannesburg.
items.body: The 28-year-old was arrested in February after a man had been shot at his home in Johannesburg.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Seven lawsuits filed against OpenAI by families of Canada mass-shooting victims
items.dek: The lawsuits, filed in California, accuse OpenAI and Sam Altman of negligence and abetting a mass shooting by failing to flag the suspect's ChatGPT activity.
items.body: The lawsuits, filed in California, accuse OpenAI and Sam Altman of negligence and abetting a mass shooting by failing to flag the suspect's ChatGPT activity.
items.author: IriLine Desk
